name: C2H — Buford
heroParagraph: Our Buford team — formerly Timco Heating & Air — serves North Atlanta's commercial buildings with HVAC, controls, electrical, plumbing, planned maintenance, and emergency response.
emailTodo: Placeholder address — confirm with C2H or replace with the real general-dispatch email. Timco's site lists mike@timcoair.com (personal) which we don't want on a public marketing page.
mapCoordsTodo: Approximated from build-directory.js (Buford centroid). Refine to street-level if available.
heroVideoTodo: Reuses the Lawrenceville hero video as a placeholder; source Buford-specific footage if desired.
industriesLead: We serve the buildings that keep North Georgia and Greater Atlanta running — across healthcare, industrial, education, hospitality, and beyond.
photoStripTodo: Hidden for launch — add Buford-specific production photos when available and the section will render again.

services.title: HVAC Services
services.body: Comprehensive heating, ventilation, and air conditioning service for commercial and industrial facilities.

services.title: Building Controls
services.body: Design, installation, and integration of building automation systems that reduce operating costs.

services.title: Electrical
services.body: Commercial electrical service and project work — power distribution, lighting, switchgear, and code-driven upgrades.

services.title: Plumbing
services.body: Commercial plumbing service, repair, and project work — domestic water, sanitary, gas, and backflow.

services.title: Planned Maintenance
services.body: Programmatic service plans with predictable scheduling and asset-level tracking.

services.title: Emergency Services
services.body: 24 / 7 emergency response — staffed dispatch and an on-call technician roster, always available.

services.title: Project Support
services.body: Design-build, retrofit, and equipment-upgrade projects delivered by tradespeople who know the install — and the service after.

servicesReviewTodo: Service bodies generic; revisit for C2H Buford-specific tone (formerly Timco). Confirm Electrical + Plumbing are in-house at Buford or referred out.
